name: RETAL Baltic Films
message: RETAL has been offering our customers complete packaging solutions for over 20 years. With 19 production sites in 10 countries, our sales area encompasses more than 70 countries throughout Europe, Asia, Africa and the Americas. Parent company RETAL Industries Ltd, whose President and Member of the Board of Directors is Anatoly Martynov is headquartered in Limassol, Cyprus. Through our combined expertise and dedication to responsible development and manufacturing, we deliver reliable value to customers in food and beverage sectors globally. To provide our customers with industry leading packaging products, services and solutions. Through our combined expertise and dedication to excellence in development and manufacturing, we deliver value to customers in food and non-food sectors globally. Plastec S.R.L. (Italy), a PET container manufacturer, is acquired
